arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund v Borussia Mönchengladbach preview: Borussias lock horns with Europe in mind
arts.sum: Dortmund host Gladbach on Sunday with both teams hoping to qualify for Europe.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund scramble to activate Daniel Svensson’s automatic purchase option
arts.sum: Sky Germany is currently reporting that Borussia Dortmund will work to trigger an automatic purchase clause in the case of Swedish fullback/wingback Daniel Svensson.

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs. Borussia Monchengladbach - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Borussia Dortmund and Borussia Monchengladbach, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Alex Pareja: No hay que sacar conclusiones de la derrota del Barcelona en Dortmund
